utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. All required details are covered and correspond to what is expected under each category.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Lisbon, Portugal), a budget airline flight in economy class, accommodation at Eco Lodge, and three activities: Hiking in Sintra-Cascais Natural Park, Yoga Retreat Day, and Street-Photography Tour. It also includes meals at Vegan Bistro and Organic Farm-to-Table dining. We match each of these to the ground-truth ratings. Lisbon, Portugal corresponds to 7.
